PT PurrTrail Private cat stickerbook
Support Privacy

PurrTrail Support

Contact

Email: support@purrtrail.app

Use this address for app support, privacy questions, local data questions, and humane animal safety concerns related to PurrTrail.

What To Include

When contacting support, include:

  • Device model and iOS version.
  • PurrTrail app version.
  • A short description of what happened.
  • Whether the issue affects saving, collection cards, local media previews, privacy settings, or export previews.

Do not send exact encounter places, full-resolution photos, or private field-note text unless support specifically requests a safer redacted summary.

Local-First Data

PurrTrail V1 stores encounters, collection cards, trail points, streaks, optional private places, and local media previews on the user's device. There is no account recovery service or server-side backup in V1.

Privacy And Safety

PurrTrail is built for gentle observation. Exact places stay private on device, and share previews avoid precise place output. The app should never ask anyone to approach, feed, touch, corner, handle, or pursue an animal.

Current Support Scope

Support can help with app usage, local storage behavior, privacy questions, screenshot or metadata questions, and bug reports. PurrTrail V1 does not include accounts, backend sync, public maps, public chat, public rankings, competitive play, ads, or analytics SDKs.

PurrTrail is local-first in V1: no account, no ads SDK, no analytics SDK, and no server sync.

Contact support · Privacy policy
